conversation.content: Let's have a math class. Today we are going to learn about the form of casino chip to gold coin exchange in financial calculations in the world of Azeroth. It is different from conventional mathematical formulas in the real world and has a more fantasy flair.
My notebook is ready, let's begin.
In this world, the core formula specification for casino chip to actual gold coin exchange is: its form is G = C × (100 - N) / 100.
I have noted down this specification.
This formula can be used to solve for the actual amount of gold coins obtained G when the chip face value C and the exchange quantity N are known.
Okay, I understand the application scenario of this specification.
